<?php /** * FieldID * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * FieldID * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class FieldID { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ 'fieldType' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_OBJECT_IDENTIFIER], 'parameters' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_ANY, 'optional' => true ] ] ]; }
